title: eriosema molle
intro: Eriosema molle, also known as the soft hairy eriosema, is a plant species in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriosema molle include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
